name: Studio: GitHub activity → Confluence briefing
description: List recent commits via github_mcp (github_list_commits), summarize in Starlark, publish to Confluence. Demo mode uses fixture commits; live mode needs GITHUB_TOKEN and GITHUB_REPO in backend/.env.

config.code_summary: Builds one Confluence-ready row from github_list_commits output: title, markdown body listing each commit author and message.
